claim_bullets.bullet_text: The chapter defines operations that transform one iterable into another, preserving collection semantics (raw/javascriptallonge.pdf p.284-287).
Operations such as mapWith, filterWith, and compact are defined to work with iterables (raw/javascriptallonge.pdf p.284-287).
Functions like zip and zipWith compose iterables into new iterables (raw/javascriptallonge.pdf p.284-287).

source_record_text: Chapter on basic operations on iterables from JavaScript Allongé.
